---
name: 🐛 Bug Report
about: Report a bug or unexpected behavior
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: ""
---

## 🐛 Description
A clear description of the bug.

## 🔄 Steps to Reproduce
1. Run `agentforge create "..."`
2. Select template `...`
3. See error

## 📋 Expected Behavior
What you expected to happen.

## 🖥️ Environment
- **OS**: (e.g., Windows 11, macOS 14, Ubuntu 22.04)
- **Node.js**: (e.g., 20.11.0)
- **AgentForge Version**: (e.g., 2.0.0)

## 📸 Screenshots / Logs
If applicable, attach terminal output or screenshots.
